hero.title: What if water already knows the answer?
hero.body: Aquaphotomics is a scientific and technological framework for understanding biological and material systems through the spectral signatures of water.

cards.title: Research
cards.body: Aquaphotomics research, water spectral patterns and system diagnostics.

cards.title: Technologies
cards.body: Spectral analysis, Aquagram® methods and future digital services.

cards.title: Applications
cards.body: Life sciences, agriculture, health, beauty, environment and industry.
